rule: File-backed adapter/app tests that write under the filesystem MUST use adapter/test/support/test_temp_dir.h (BsTestTempDirGuard + bs_test_unique_temp_dir). GATE-TEST-HERM forbids fixed bs_* cwd paths, bare bs_reload_* / bs_day8_* strings, and fs::absolute("bs_...") without a unique temp suffix. Covers Io* tests, reload/attach integration, AttachResilience manifest dirs, and security-audit manifest fixtures (P0-HERM-IO W1–W4).
